opportunities.entry_trigger: Enter long on dip to 67000-69500 if BTC holds above 63k support; or on clean 4h close above 71k for breakout entry.
opportunities.rationale: BTC has rallied from ~67k to ~69,883, confirming strength as the risk complex stabilises post-VIX spike. Macro risk-off (VIX 24.9) caps upside but BTC is outperforming high-beta alts. Target 77k on trend continuation. Invalidated if risk-off accelerates and BTC breaks below 63k.

opportunities.entry_trigger: Enter near 1960-2000 if price holds 1900 on next correction and BTC is stable above 67k.
opportunities.rationale: ETH recovered to ~$2,028 from prior lows. Risk/reward is acceptable for a small swing position but conviction is low given ETH's underperformance vs BTC YTD and macro headwinds. Position size kept minimal.
